explicit_text: I was born in Hopkinsville, Kentucky, but my family moved around a lot because my dad was in the military. We left when I was about five years old, so I don’t have many memories of Hopkinsville itself. It’s where my story began before we settled in Georgia.
implicit_text: I was born in a small city in western Kentucky, but my family moved around a lot because my dad was in the military. We left when I was about five years old, so I don’t have many memories of that place itself. It’s where my story began before we settled in the southeastern U.S.

explicit_text: After moving around during my early childhood, my family settled back in Georgia when I was five. I later attended dental school at the Medical College of Georgia, which was a key step in my career. Georgia was an important place in my early education and professional development.
implicit_text: After moving around during my early childhood, my family settled back in the southeastern U.S. state known for peaches when I was five. I later attended dental school at the state's medical college, which was a key step in my career. That state was an important place in my early education and professional development.
cues: moved back to Georgia at age five

explicit_text: I went to dental school at the Medical College of Georgia, which really set the foundation for my career as a general dentist. It was there that I gained the skills I needed to practice and eventually settle into my professional life. That education was crucial before I moved to Charlotte, North Carolina.
implicit_text: I went to dental school at the main public medical college in the southeastern state known for peaches, which really set the foundation for my career as a general dentist. It was there that I gained the skills I needed to practice and eventually settle into my professional life. That education was crucial before I moved to a major city in North Carolina.

explicit_text: Charlotte was home for me for about twenty-four years after dental school. I lived and worked there, running two pediatric dentistry practices with my wife. It was a growing city with lots of opportunities, and it’s where I met my wife and started a family and business life before we moved back to Kentucky.
implicit_text: That major North Carolina city was home for me for about twenty-four years after dental school. I lived and worked there, running two pediatric dentistry practices with my wife. It was a growing city with lots of opportunities, and it’s where I met my wife and started a family and business life before we moved back to Kentucky.

explicit_text: We moved to Mount Sterling, Kentucky, in August 2024 as part of our plan to slow down and give back to the community. It’s been wonderful to find The Post Clinic just minutes from our house, where I volunteer and my wife works as a staff dentist. This community has a special spirit of service and care that really resonates with us.

This community has a special spirit of service and care that really resonates with us.

explicit_text: I was born and raised in Lexington, Kentucky, attending Bryan Station High School there. I started college on an engineering scholarship but later switched to dentistry, completing my dental education and residency at the University of Kentucky. Lexington shaped my early life and professional training before I moved on to other opportunities.

I started college on an engineering scholarship but later switched to dentistry, completing my dental education and residency at the state's flagship university. That city shaped my early life and professional training before I moved on to other opportunities.

explicit_text: I graduated from Bryan Station High School in Lexington, Kentucky. It was one of the schools considered 'bad sides of town,' but I managed to succeed and move on to college with an engineering scholarship. That high school was the starting point of my academic journey.

explicit_text: I completed my dental degree and a two-year hospital dentistry residency at the University of Kentucky. I also joined the faculty there after finishing my pediatric dentistry specialty. The university was central to my training and early career, although I eventually left due to tenure limitations.

explicit_text: I pursued my master's degree and specialty in pediatric dentistry at Ohio State University. This advanced training helped me focus my career on working with children, which I found more fulfilling than working with adults. Ohio State was a pivotal step in my professional specialization.

explicit_text: When considering where to establish my pediatric dentistry practice, Richmond, Virginia, was one of the cities I looked at. explicit_text: The Post Clinic has become like family to us since we moved to Mount Sterling. My wife works there as a staff dentist, and I volunteer on the same days. The clinic’s mission of serving patients with respect and dignity really aligns with our values, and the sense of community among volunteers and patients is truly inspiring.

The clinic’s mission of serving patients with respect and dignity really aligns with our values, and the sense of community among volunteers and patients is truly inspiring.

explicit_text: In our private practices in Charlotte, we saw many patients with Medicaid and often provided a significant amount of free dental care. We never aimed to be wealthy but wanted to ensure access to care for those who couldn’t afford it. This experience shaped our philosophy and made volunteering at The Post Clinic a natural fit.
implicit_text: In our private practices in the major North Carolina city, we saw many patients covered by government health insurance and often provided a significant amount of free dental care. We never aimed to be wealthy but wanted to ensure access to care for those who couldn’t afford it. This experience shaped our philosophy and made volunteering at the local Kentucky clinic a natural fit.
